sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id UInt32, value Nullable(Decimal(76, 10))) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, value) VALUES (1, toDecimal256OrNull('123.456', 10));
UPDATE test_decimal SET value = toDecimal256OrNull('789.01', 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, value, toTypeName(value) AS type FROM test_decimal WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
